Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"

Bot: remove empty section(s)
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)

Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)

Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==English Content== {{Navseasoncats}} Eligible are all non-fiction writers active in the 13th century, irrespective of whether they were born in the 12th or died in the 14th century {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[ar:Category:تصنيف:كتاب غير روائيين في القرن 13]] [[ar:Category:كتاب غير روائيين في القرن 13]] [[bn:Category:বিষয়শ্রেণী:১৩শ শতাব্দীর অ-কল্পকাহিনী লেখক]] [[bn:Category:১৩শ শতাব্দীর অ-কল্পকাহিনী লেখক]] [[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[cy:Category:Categori:Llenorion ffeithiol y 13eg ganrif]] [[cy:Category:Llenorion ffeithiol y 13eg ganrif]] [[en:Category:13th-century non-fiction writers]] [[en:Category:13th-century non-fiction writers]] [[fa:Category:رده:نویسندگان غیرداستانی سده ۱۳ (میلادی)]] [[fa:Category:نویسندگان غیرداستانی سده ۱۳ (میلادی)]] [[ja:Category:13世紀のノンフィクション作家]] [[ja:Category:13世紀のノンフィクション作家]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:13世紀の随筆家]]
==Local Content==
[[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
